snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D’Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director’s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: IND vs NZ, Final Match Today, Live Cricket Match Today| INDIA vs New Zealand Live | World Cup Final
snippet.description:
#livestream #cricketlive #t20worldcup 
#Cricket

Hello and welcome to By The Way Cricket Channel 
Host : Shahid 



Today Topic : IND vs NZ, Final Match Today, Live Cricket Match Today| INDIA vs New Zealand Live | World Cup Final

🔴Match :  The Grand Finale: India vs New Zealand
🔴Venue: Narendra Modi Stadium, Ahmedabad
🔴Date : 08 MAR 2026
🔴Time: 7:30pm IST


Details about this Match :

Will New Zealand clinch their maiden T20 World Cup title, or will India become the first team to successfully defend the crown and lift the trophy at home? To find out,

Both teams have had different match-winners stepping up at crucial stages of the tournament, which has propelled them into the summit clash. For India, the likes of Ishan Kishan, Jasprit Bumrah, Sanju Samson, Hardik Pandya, Suryakumar Yadav and Shivam Dube have delivered when it mattered the most. New Zealand, meanwhile, have relied on the contributions of Finn Allen, Tim Seifert, Rachin Ravindra and Matt Henry.

The centre pitch is likely to be used for the grand finale. It is expected to be a mixed-soil surface, similar to the one used for the Indian Premier League final in 2025 and different from the pitch that was used during the 2023 ODI World Cup final at this venue.

Topics we are going to Discuss :👉👉

snippet.title: TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
TATEEREE | Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Latest Haryanvi Song

#tateereesong #tatirisong #tateeree #badshah #badshahsong #badshahnewsong #haryanvi #haryanvisong #haryanvisongsharyanavi #haryanvisongs #haryanvigane #hrsong #newharyanvisong #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2025 #haryanvidjsong #haryanviculture  

A fresh and energetic New Haryanvi Song 2026 – “TATEEREE (Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri)”, presented by Haryanvi Star Records, bringing the vibrant flavor of Haryana’s folk rhythm and modern music together.

This song captures the playful romance and desi swag of Haryanvi culture. The catchy line “Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri” adds a fun and addictive vibe that makes everyone want to dance and enjoy the rhythm.

With powerful vocals, lively beats, and colorful visuals, TATEEREE is a perfect mix of traditional Haryanvi style and modern music production that will make you listen to it again and again.

If you love Haryanvi songs, desi swag, and energetic beats, this track is made for you.

🔥 Turn up the volume and enjoy the vibe of TATEEREE.

👍 Like | 🔔 Subscribe | 💬 Comment | 📤 Share

Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | WILDCARD | Day 4
snippet.description:
The WILDCARD stage is live.

Teams now battle for one final opportunity to secure their place in the SEMI FINALS. The margin for error is gone and every match carries serious weight.

Only the top 8 teams from this stage will move forward.

One more chance. One more fight. Everything on the line.

Watch the WILDCARD live and see who earns their spot in the SEMI FINALS.

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kraftonindiaesports/
Follow us on X: https://x.com/KIEOFFICIAL_
Join our official Discord server: https://discord.gg/P53etCn5ve

#BGIS2026 #BreakingBoundaries #BGMILIVE #KraftonIndiaEsports #BGMI

snippet.title: KISAAN BAHURIYA OFFICIAL TRAILER I किसान बहुरिया I ANJANA SINGH I PRASHANT SINGH I BHOJPURI MOVIE
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #khushijha #golutiwari #kisaanbahuriya #manjulthakur #omjha #trailer #bhojpurimovie #bhojpurisuperhitmovie 


IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
फ़िल्म –  किसान बहुरिया (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – अंजना  सिंह  , प्रशांत  सिंह  , ख़ुशी झा  , विद्या  सिंह  , गोलू  तिवारी  , अशोक  मिश्रा  , सुधा  यादव  
बाल कलाकार - दीक्षा मिश्रा
निर्देशक – मंजुल ठाकुर
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक   - अरबिंद तिवारी  
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी , प्यारे लाल यादव 
छायांकन -  इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान
कोरियोग्राफर – एम .के .गुप्ता (जॉय )
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - दास स्टूडियो
प्रोडक्शन  कंट्रोलर  – रोशन  रॉय  , सोनू  मिश्रा 
लोकल  प्रोडक्शन  –  मुकेश  दुबे  ,कमलेश  सिंह, दुष्यंत   सिंह   
आर्ट डायरेक्टर – नज़ीर शेख
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, मंजुल ठाकुर
 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव

B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय – कन्हैया झा 

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस  -
 प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे , हिमांशु चौधरी 

B4U - फाइनेंस-
 संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार

FILM- KISAAN BAHURIYA (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- Anjana singh , Prashant singh , Khushijha , Vidhya singh , Golu tiwari , Ashok Mishra , Sudha Yadav , 
CHILD ARTIST – DIKSHA MISHRA 
DIRECTOR- MANJUL THAKUR 
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER - ARBIND TIWARI 
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA 
LYRICS – ARBIND TIWARI, PYARE LAL YADAV
EDITOR- SAMEER SHAIKH, ZAHEED KHAN
CINEMATOGRAPHER- IMRAN SHAGUN 
CHOREOGRAPHER- M.K GUPTA (JOY)
ART DIRECTOR- NAZEER SHAIKH 
POST PRODUCTION – DAS STUDIO
PRODUCTION CONTROLLER – ROSHAN ROY , SONU MISHRA
LOCAL PRODUCTION – MUKESH DUBEY, KAMLESH SINGH, DUSHYANT SINGH  
PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, MANJUL THAKUR
Music, satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 

B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL , POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE, MORE
OFFICE BOY - KANHAIYA JHA

IVY ENETERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , GANESH MAHADEV TAPRE , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY


B4U – FINANCE TEAM
 SANTOSH GARG , RAVINDER SALVI, SAKSHI SHELAR 

         


Subscribe us - https://www.youtube.com/@b4ubhojpuri-
Follow us on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/
Follow us on Instagram - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/

The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

snippet.title: HACKER OR WHAT | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan
📺 YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@JONATHANGAMINGYT/
🐦 Twitter - @ig_jonathan16

🎮 Join the #JonathanArmy & Be Part of the Esports Revolution! 🎮
💖 Like, Share & Subscribe for More Epic Content! 💖

#JONATHANISLIVE #JONATHANBGMI #JONATHANGAMING #ESPORTS #BGMIINDIA #GAMING #LIVESTREAM

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

Es ist ein Wettlauf, super spannend und wir haben jede Menge gelacht. Ich liebe diese Herausforderungen.

Wenn dieses Video 500.000 Likes bekommt, wird es ein Rematch geben!

Nicht etwa "Minecraft, aber Wasser steigt" oder "Minecraft, aber Lava steigt" oder irgendeine ähnliche "aber" Herausforderung. Dies ist ein Speedrun / Minecraft Speedrunner gegen einen Killer/Assassinen.

ru.title: Майнкрафт Спидраннер VS 6 Охотников
ru.description:
Майнкрафт Спидраннер VS 6 Охотников. Вы этого просили. Продолжение рубрики. Это было совершенно безумно.

Подпишитесь на мои соцсети:
➽ Твиттер - @Dream
➽ Инстаграм - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Снэпчат - @Dreampublic

George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Мы решили назвать эту рубрику Майнкрафт Мэнхант. Это видео - другое исполнение этой рубрики, где охотников ШЕСТЕРО вместо ТРЕХ охотников или всего одного.

Это новый Майнкрафт но, 1.21.11 челлендж, который мы решили попробовать. Я пытаюсь пройти игру, пока мой друг Джордж, И мой друг Сапнап, И мой друг БэдБойХэйло, И мой друг Энтфрост, И мой друг awesamdude, И моя подруга КапитанПаффи пытаются меня остановить. Это гонка, и это супер напряженно, и мы много смеялись. Я люблю устраивать эти челленджи.

Если это видео наберет 500 000 лайков, мы устроим рематч!

Не Майнкрафт, Но Вода Поднимается или Майнкрафт, Но Лава Поднимается, или любой другой подобный но челлендж. Это спидран / спидраннер Майнкрафта против убийцы / ассасина

#MinecraftManhunt

bg.description:
Minecraft Спийдрънър СРЕЩУ 6-ма Ловци. Вие го поискахте. Продължението на поредицата. Това беше абсолютно лудост.

​Последвайте ме в социалните мрежи:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic
​Мърч: https://dream.shop/

​BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

​Решихме да наречем тази поредица Minecraft Manhunt. Това видео е различен вариант, в който има ШЕСТИМА преследвачи вместо ТРИМА или само един.
​Това е ново „Minecraft, но...“ 1.21.11 предизвикателство, което решихме да изпробваме. Опитвам се да превъртя играта, докато моите приятели George И Sapnap И BadBoyHalo И Antfrost И awesamdude И CaptainPuffy се опитват да ми попречат. Това е състезание, беше супер напрегнато и много се забавлявахме. Обичам да правя тези предизвикателства.

​Ако това видео събере 500 000 харесвания, ще направим реванш!

​Това не е „Minecraft, но водата се покачва“ или „Minecraft, но лавата се покачва“, или което и да е друго подобно предизвикателство. Това е спийдрън / спийдрънър на Minecraft срещу убиец/асасин.

​#MinecraftManhunt

uk.title: Майнкрафт Спідранер Проти 6 Мисливців
uk.description:

Це новий Майнкрафт, але 1.21.11 виклик що ми вирішили спробувати. Я намагаюсь пройти гру, поки мій друг Джордж і мій друг Сепнеп і мій друг БедБойХало і мій друг Антфрост і мій друг Авсемдуд і моя подруга КапітанПаффі намагаються не дати мені цього зробити. zh.title: 我的世界：猎人游戏 1名速通者 VS 6 名猎人
zh.description:
我的世界：猎人游戏 1名速通者 VS 6 名猎人，你们一直在催的内容来了——这个系列的续作！这一次的对决简直疯狂到离谱。

关注我的社交平台：
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

周边商品：
https://dream.shop/

参与者：
BadBoyHalo @thesaintsofgames
George @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap @Sapnap
Antfrost @Antfrost
awesamdude @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy @CaptainPuffy

我们把这个系列称为 Minecraft Manhunt（我的世界猎人游戏）。不过这一次的版本和以往不同——不是三名猎人，也不是一名猎人，而是整整六名猎人！

这是一次基于 Minecraft 1.21.11 的全新挑战：
我的目标是通关游戏，而我的朋友 George、Sapnap、BadBoyHalo、Antfrost、awesamdude 和 CaptainPuffy 的唯一任务，就是不惜一切代价阻止我。这是一场竞速对决，节奏紧张到爆，全程高能，我们也笑个不停。我真的很喜欢做这种挑战。

如果这个视频达到 50 万点赞，我们就来一场复赛！

这不是"Minecraft，但水位上升"或"Minecraft，但岩浆上升"那类“MC但是...挑战”。这是 Minecraft 速通者 vs 猎人/刺客 的极限对抗。

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep Ohlan’s allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival. While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#aspirants #AspirantsOnPrime #trailer #officialtrailer #webseries #primevideoindia

en.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
en.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep Ohlan’s allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival. While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

snippet.title: TORE KE LET RAHIYO (Song): Aashish Yadav | Khushi Kakkar | Neha Singh | New Bhojpuri Song 2026
snippet.description:
भोजपुरी संगीत प्रेमियों के लिए पेश है धमाकेदार गाना "तोरे की लेत रहियो (Tore Ke Let Rahiyo)" । इस गाने को अपनी मधुर आवाज़ दी है आशीष यादव और खुशी कक्कड़ ने। शानदार बोल लिखे हैं चिंटू राजा ने और इसका दमदार संगीत तैयार किया है चमन सिंह ने।

भोजपुरी संगीत प्रेमियों के लिए पेश है धमाकेदार गाना "तोरे की लेत रहियो (Tore Ke Let Rahiyo)" । इस गाने को अपनी मधुर आवाज़ दी है आशीष यादव और खुशी कक्कड़ ने। शानदार बोल लिखे हैं चिंटू राजा ने और इसका दमदार संगीत तैयार किया है चमन सिंह ने।

#ToreKiLetRahiyo #AashishYadav #khushikakkar 

Credits:
Featuring- Aashish Yadav, Neha Singh
Singers- Aashish Yadav, Khushi Kakkar
Lyrics:- Chintu Raja
Music :- Chaman Singh 
Video Director- Ashish Satyarthi
Project Manager- T-Series- Sonu Srivastava
Post Production- Vicky Ji
Editor- Papu Varama
Di- Rohit Singh
Dop -Rahul Yadav
Choreographer - Aslam Ji


SUBSCRIBE T-Series channel Hamaar Bhojpuri for unlimited entertainment
http://www.youtube.com/hamaarbhojpuri
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tserieshamaarbhojpuri/
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/tserieshamaarbhojpuri/

en-US.description:
Dhamakedar song "Tore Ke Let Rahiyo" is presented to Bhojpuri music lovers. Ashish Yadav and Khushi Kakkar have given their sweet voices to this song. Brilliant lyrics are written by Chintu Raja and breathtaking music is composed by Chaman Singh.

#LetKeepKeeping #AashishYadav #Khushikakkar

snippet.title: पवित्तर ना रहब (4K Video) Shivani Singh | Ft. Sona Singh | Pawitar Na Rahab | New Bhojpuri Song 2026
snippet.description:
वेव म्यूजिक (Wave Music) प्रस्तुत करते हैं शिवानी सिंह की आवाज़ में साल 2026 का सबसे बड़ा भोजपुरी गाना "पवित्तर ना रहब"। इस गाने में भोजपुरी की मशहूर अभिनेत्री सोना सिंह अपनी अदाकारी का जलवा बिखेर रही हैं।

इस दर्द भरे और धमाकेदार गीत का आनंद 4K अल्ट्रा एचडी (Ultra HD) क्वालिटी में उठाएं। अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आए, तो वीडियो को लाइक करें, शेयर करें और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें!

Subscribe करने के लिए क्लिक करें 👉 - http://goo.gl/ip2lbk

ಯುದ್ಧ ಸಿಮ್ಯುಲೇಶನ್ ನಿಜವಾದ ಸಿಮ್ಯುಲೇಶನ್‌ಗಿಂತ ಭಿನ್ನವಾಗಿರಬಹುದು.

ಸುದ್ದಿಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಕಾಣಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳುವ ಲೇಖನಗಳನ್ನು ನಾವು ಸಿಮ್ಯುಲೇಟೆಡ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೇವೆ.

ARMA ಗೇಮ್‌ಪ್ಲೇ ವೀಡಿಯೊ.

"ಈ ವೀಡಿಯೊವನ್ನು ಬೊಹೆಮಿಯಾ ಇಂಟರಾಕ್ಟಿವ್ a.s ನಿಂದ ವಿಷಯವನ್ನು ಬಳಸಿಕೊಂಡು ನಿರ್ಮಿಸಲಾಗಿದೆ."

snippet.title: The Boys Final Season Trailer Breakdown | Homelander vs Butcher ENDGAME
snippet.description:
The final season of The Boys is almost here and the new trailer just revealed some massive secrets. Homelander wants to become more than powerful… he wants to become a god. Meanwhile Billy Butcher is planning to release a virus that could wipe out every supe on the planet.

In this video we break down the The Boys Season 5 trailer, hidden details, easter eggs, Soldier Boy’s return, the mysterious V1 Compound V, and the upcoming war between Homelander and Butcher.

Will Homelander finally rule the world or will Butcher become an even bigger villain?

Watch till the end for theories and predictions about The Boys Final Season.

Will Homelander finally rule the world or will Butcher become an even bigger villain?

Watch till the end for theories and predictions about The Boys Final Season.

snippet.title: Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱

This video is about the Indian Bike Driving 3D game, this is a horror scary story about Mystery Container or Mystery Box In Indian Bike Driving 3D. In this scary story, Franklin meets many ghosts and monsters like Granny, Mr. Meat, Choo Choo Charles, Maya Ek Pisachini, and Scary Teacher. To unlock his own mystery container in Indian Bike Driving 3D, Franklin must invite all these ghosts. Will Franklin survive this horror adventure? What is inside the mystery box of franklin of Indian Bike Driving 3D? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. ❤️

Some 3D assets and mods are sourced from community modders and are used for fan-made cinematic purposes.
No ownership is claimed over any third-party assets.

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.
 

This is a fan-made, fictional, and transformative video that falls under Fair Use (Section 107) for commentary, parody, and storytelling.

Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for “fair use” for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education, and research.

Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statutes that might otherwise be infringing.

About : NessFit Gamer is a youtube channel, where you will find stories of gta 5 game in Hindi, I hope this video was entertaining and you like it, if you did smash the thumbs up button.

Special Credit to –  
Indian Bike Driving 3D – Rohit Gaming Studios

snippet.title: Dhurandhar 2 Trailer Review | Aditya Dhar & Ranveer Singh Create Pure Madness
snippet.description:
#TheReviewPoint

Dhurandhar The Revenge trailer is finally out and it has completely blown away expectations. Directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh in dual powerful avatars as Jaskirat Singh Rangi and Hamza Ali Mazari, the trailer promises a massive cinematic spectacle.

The scale, background score, action sequences and intense face-offs make Dhurandhar 2 look like one of the biggest Indian films ever made. With powerhouse actors like R Madhavan, Sanjay Dutt, Akshaye Khanna and Arjun Rampal joining the cast, the film is set to deliver an explosive big-screen experience.

In this video we break down the Dhurandhar The Revenge trailer, analyse the story hints, discuss Ranveer Singh’s ferocious performance and explain why this film could become a massive box office storm.

Advance bookings have already started trending and many trade analysts are predicting record-breaking numbers on the opening day.

Watch this full breakdown to understand why Dhurandhar 2 could be one of the biggest action spectacles in Indian cinema.

Release Date: 19 March

snippet.title: Lamba Lamba Ghunghat Kahe Ko Dala | Mujhko Rana Ji Maaf Karna | 90's Bollywood Dance Song
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song Name: Mujhko Rana Ji Maaf Karna
Movie Name: Karan Arjun
Singer(s) : Ila Arun, Alka Yagnik
Music Director : Rajesh Roshan
Lyricist : Indeevar

Song Lyrics :

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup 
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Kya Kaheen Kar Aayi Tu Munh Kaala Re 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Kaanon Mein Batiyaan Karti Hain Sakhiyaan 
Raat Kiya Re Tune Kaisa Ghotala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Vo Bahanoi Tha Bahanoi Thahara 
Kyon Na Pahachaana Toone Piya Ji Ka Chehara 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bahanoi Ne Odh Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Rakhi Thi Chaadar Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Main Samajhi Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Piya Ka Hai Bistar Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Aadhe Bistar Pe Vo Soya Tha
Aadhe Pe Main So Gai 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata Toh Hoga
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata To Hoga
Chhitaki To Hogi Chhat Pe Chandaniya 
Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bhool Hui Mujhase To Kaisa Achambha
Kaisa Achambha Kaisa Achambha
Bahanoi Tha Piya Jitana Lamba
Piya Jitana Lamba Piya Jitana Lamba
Choor Thi Main Din Bhar Ki Thakan Se 
Padate Hi Bistar Pe So Gai 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Soch Rahe The Ham Sab Jaisa
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Toone Kiya Nahi Kuch Vaisa 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Mukhade Pe Tere Sach Ka Ujaala 
Raat Kiya Nahi Munh Toone Kaala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

#GupChupGupChup #KaranArjun #MamtaKulkarni #AlkaYagnik #IlaArun #RajeshRoshan 

Gup Chup Gup Chup | Alka Yagnik | Karan Arjun | Item Song

snippet.title: Graphic Designer REACTS to Dhurandhar 2 Trailer | A KibaKibi Breakdown
snippet.description:
Graphic Designer REACTS to Dhurandhar 2 Trailer | A KibaKibi Breakdown

Follow me on Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/shamim.mokles/

0:00 Intro
0:30 Decoding the technicality of the Black and white shots
2:20 Talking about Ranveer Singh's Acting
2:53 The story of the Trailer and the editing
4:09 The Jinn shots and Conviction of Aditya Dhar
7:18 The Concert moment of the Trailer
8:19 The arguable inspirations
8:43 The Three act structure of the Trailer
9:57 My Opinions
12:30 Outro

Hi, This is me, Shamim. I am an Assamese currently living in Bangalore. A graphic designer by profession and a Magician by hobby. Thanks for stopping by. If you enjoyed the video please hit the like button. Subscribe and stay tuned for more videos. See you in the next video.

Free KibaKibi Wallpapers (Google sign-in required)
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1S2QdO6-hLJHSVe0lgQcOsYP04PvD_nTA?usp=sharing

Preview of my portfolio
https://www.behance.net/mokles

Or send me a friend request
https://www.facebook.com/shamim.mokles?ref=bookmarks

My main and only camera: Canon 200D
My vlogging lens: Canon 18-55 Kit lens
Telephoto Lens used in some videos: Canon 55-250 Zoom
Fast lense used in some videos: Canon 50mm Prime
My mini-tripod: Amazon Basic GorillaPod
My full tripod: Amazon Basic Tripod
Shotgun mic: Boya MM1
Lavelier Mic/collar mic: Boya Lav Mic
Camera bag: Badger DSLR SLR Camera & Lens Shoulder Backpack

snippet.title: तीन बाण के धारी | छोटू सिंह रावना | Khatu shyam New bhajan | Teen baan ke Dhari | Chotu Singh Rawna
snippet.description:
तीन बाण के धारी | छोटू सिंह रावना | Khatu shyam New bhajan | Teen baan ke Dhari | Chotu Singh Rawna

तीन बाण के धारी बाबा श्याम की महिमा को समर्पित यह नवीन भजन,
छोटू सिंह रावना की मधुर आवाज़ में।
खाटू नरेश श्री श्याम बाबा, जो तीन बाण धारण करने वाले कलयुग के देवता हैं,
अपने भक्तों की हर पुकार सुनते हैं और कष्ट हर लेते हैं।
यह भजन श्रद्धा, भक्ति और आस्था से भरपूर है।
🙏 बाबा श्याम से प्रार्थना है कि यह भजन आप सभी के जीवन में सुख, शांति और कृपा लेकर आए।
जय श्री श्याम 🙏
अगर भजन पसंद आए तो
👍 Like | 🔔 Subscribe | 💬 Comment ज़रूर करें


#TeenBaanKeDhari
#तीनबाणकेधारी
#KhatuShyamBhajan
#खाटूश्यामभजन
#ChotuSinghRawna
#छोटूसिंहरावना
#ShyamBabaBhajan
#KhatuShyamJi

तीन बाण के धारी बाबा श्याम की महिमा को समर्पित यह नवीन भजन,
छोटू सिंह रावना की मधुर आवाज़ में।
खाटू नरेश श्री श्याम बाबा, जो तीन बाण धारण करने वाले कलयुग के देवता हैं,
अपने भक्तों की हर पुकार सुनते हैं और कष्ट हर लेते हैं।
यह भजन श्रद्धा, भक्ति और आस्था से भरपूर है।
🙏 बाबा श्याम से प्रार्थना है कि यह भजन आप सभी के जीवन में सुख, शांति और कृपा लेकर आए।

LYRICS :
गीतकार - संजय वर्मा 
(पुरुष) 
झन नाच ना, झन नाच ना, झन नाच ना वो रानी... झन नाच ना, झन नाच ना, झन नाच ना वो रानी...
तोर कनिहा धर लिही ता, का मैं भरहूँ वो पानी... तोर कनिहा धर लिही ता, का मैं भरहूँ वो पानी...
(महिला) 
मैं नाचहूँ, मैं नाचहूँ, गर्दा उड़ा हूँ राजा  [ (पुरुष) अरे नहीं रे .....]
मैं नाचहूँ, मैं नाचहूँ, गर्दा उड़ा हूँ राजा  [ (पुरुष) ये दद्दा .....]
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा......

(संवाद - पुरुष) ऐ रानी... सुन तो...

(पुरुष) 
अरे...... 
ऐसे तैं हां डोले ता बड़ डर लागे वो 
माते-माते चले ता फिकर लागे वो

(महिला)
हाय......
Don't worry सांसो ला साइड करा हो
आवा मोर संग मा तहूँ वाइब (vibe) लेवा हो

(पुरुष)
हाय तोर पातर कमर, पूरा महफ़िल गदर
ये ... 
टुक-टुक देखे जब लहर मारे वो टुक-टुक देखे जब लहर मारे वो

(महिला)
मैं नाचहूँ, मैं नाचहूँ, गर्दा उड़ा हूँ राजा……. 
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा 
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा.........

सिटी (vissil)....

(संगीत अंतराल)
तकीड तकीड धा... धा धा धा... धा धा धा... धा धा धा...

(पुरुष):
अरे महफ़िल मा फदित्ता न करवा, चल सीधा घर तोर बताहूँ रे मजा!
(महिला): 
अच्छा! बड़ा भारी मरद बने हवस तैं हां ना, 
घर भर मा चलथे गा तोरे मरदा। 
(पुरुष): 
तोर जोड़त हव हाथ, तोर परत हव पांव... 
इज्जत के फलूदा तैं हां झन वो करा! इज्जत के फलूदा तैं हां झन वो करा!

(महिला)
मैं नाचहूँ, मैं नाचहूँ, गर्दा उड़ा हूँ राजा...................   [ (पुरुष) नहीं रानी.....]
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा 
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा

मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा 
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा...................
 
(पुरुष):
झन नाच ना, झन नाच ना...
(महिला): सुने जी... 
(पुरुष): ना...

snippet.title: Zindagi Ki Talash Mein - HD Video | Kumar Sanu | Aditya Pancholi, Varsha Usgaonkar |  Superhit Song
snippet.description:
Zindagi Ki Talash Mein - HD Video | Kumar Sanu | Aditya Pancholi, Varsha Usgaonkar |  Superhit Song

~Credit
Song : Zindagi Ki Talash Mein
Star Cast : Aditya Pancholi, Varsha Usgaonkar, Mohsin Khan, Paresh Rawal, Anupam Kher, Avtar Gill
Singer : Kumar Sanu
Music Director : Bhushan Dua
Lyrics : Sameer

~Lyrics (Zindagi Ki Talash Mein)
Zindagi ki talaash mein hum
Maut ke kitne paas aa gaye
Jab yeh socha to ghabra gaye
Aa gaye hum kahan aa gaye

Zindagi ki talaash mein hum
Maut ke kitne paas aa gaye

Hum the aise safar pe chale
Jiski koi manzil nahi
Hum ne saari umar jo kiya
Uska koi bhi haasil nahi
Uska koi bhi haasil nahi
Ik khushi ki talaash main the
Kitne gam humko tadpa gaye
Jab yeh socha to ghabra gaye
Aa gaye hum kahan aa gaye

Socho hum kitne mazboor the
Jo na karna tha vo kar gaye
Peechhe mud ke jo dekha zara
Apne halaat se darr gaye
Apne halaat se darr gaye
Khudh ke baare main soche jo hum
Apne aap se sharma gaye
Jab yeh socha to ghabra gaye
Aa gaye hum kahan aa gaye

Zindagi ki talaash mein hum
Maut ke kitne paas aa gaye.

હો બજાર ના બંગલા વાલા તને લાગ્યા
ઝૂંપડા જોઈ હવે છેટા તમે ભાગ્યા 
હો વધેલા પથરા આવ્યા મારે આડા 
અમારા થઈને અમને ભરમાયા

હે આજે તુ શે રાજી કાલે અમે રાજી...(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે

પોતાના પારકા નથી સેહવાતુ 
હો વાર પછી વારો હઉ નો આવશે

snippet.title: रविवार भक्ति | नॉनस्टॉप राम भजन | NonStop Ram Bhajan | Shree Ram Ji Ke Bhajan  | Ram Bhajan | Bhakti
snippet.description:

⭐Song : 
रामा रामा रटते रटते बीती रे उमरिया
राम का नाम जपो सुबह-शाम
तुम उठो सिया श्रृंगार करो
हमारे साथ श्री रघुनाथ 
मेरे मालिक के दरबार 
मंगल भवन अमंगल हारी 
कण कण में श्री राम हर मन 
जितना दिया सरकार ने मुझको 
श्री राम जय राम जय जय राम
आरती कीजे श्री राम लला की

⭐Singer : Upasana Mehta & Sanchit
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)

⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

thaanda thaanda marajaaga nakhare karod leri
nakhare karod leri….

thaanda thaanda marajaaga nakhare karod leri
nakhare karod leri….

ใครจะเป็นผู้ชนะในสงครามเต็มรูปแบบครั้งนี้? แสดงความคิดเห็นและวิเคราะห์ของคุณได้เลย! 👇

การโจมตีทางอากาศของสหรัฐฯ (F-22 และ A-10)

snippet.description:

☄️ Lyrics:

Teri Aage Pichhe Laage Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jibb Te Re Pakda Yo Hath Tane Mera
Thodi Thodi Main To Ghabrandi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi
Ho Chadheya Isa Pyaar Aala Bhut Merepe
Teri Photo Wallpaper Pe Landi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Aakhya Me Aankh Mane Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Dub Gaya Mai Billi Billi Aankhya Mein Bairan

Teri Hasi Ke Hasi Jama Zeher Chhori Re
Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe Dhave Keher Chhori Re
Kade Rolya Me Pair Bhi Na Tekya Manne
Tere Paache Paale Baithe Ghane Bair Chhori Re

Tu Fursat Te Ghadi I Think Meri Jaan
Honth Tere Lal Gaal Pink Meri Jaan
Paida Pe Paid Tu Mila Ke Chaliye
Teri Gel Deun Gaane Main Sync Meri Jaan

Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Manne Dil Ka Tu Laage Se Ameer Chhore Re

Ho Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Mane Dil Ka Tu Lage Se Ameer Chhore Re
Teri Meri Jodi Ke Re Laage Na Nazar
Main To Mandira Me Dive Makha Landi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Kise Paache Itne Na Phhire
Jitne Tere Pichhe Bhatak Rahe Hai
Laa Ke Chhati Se Keh De Na I Love You
Chhore Tere Ke Saans Atak Rahe Hai

Ho Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

snippet.description:
శివుని భక్తి పాటలు | లింగాష్టకం | Shivastakam | Monday Special Shiva Bhakti Songs Telugu  

Shiva Bhakti Songs are powerful devotional songs dedicated to Lord Shiva, the supreme destroyer of evil and the symbol of peace and divine energy. Listening to Lingashtakam and Shivastakam with devotion is believed to remove negative energies, bring peace, prosperity, and spiritual strength into life. 

Listen to these powerful Shiva Bhakti Songs, Lingashtakam and Shivastakam, and receive the blessings of Lord Shiva.

🙏 Om Namah Shivaya
🙏 Har Har Mahadev
